title: Top Iran official vows attacks on tankers using Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: An Iranian military official threatened to "set on fire" ships in the Strait of Hormuz, a vital oil transit route. This warning follows US and Israeli strikes, leading most shipping companies to halt passage through the strait. The reduced traffic raises concerns about oil supply disruptions and potential price hikes for consumers.
